note: Tamper-evidence integrity pins for the governance constitution the IX pipeline gate enforces (RSI safe-loop research 2026-06-07; reference_safe_rsi_loop_validated). Each value is `<algo>:<hex>` over the constitution file at governance/demerzel/constitutions/<name> (the file lives in the Demerzel SUBMODULE; this pin lives in IX's own tree so IX asserts which constitution it was reviewed against). The gate (crates/ix-skill governance_gate + ConstitutionGate::load) fails CLOSED on mismatch; a missing entry is reported as `unpinned` (never silently trusted). Regenerate ONLY for a deliberate, reviewed constitution change: PowerShell `(Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 <file>).Hash.ToLower()` or `sha256sum <file>`. An undeclared edit (no re-pin) is exactly what this catches — both at runtime and in CI via the default_constitution_matches_committed_pin test.
